item.title: The Best Way to Twist Square Tubing
item.description: A calm, practical look at twisting square tubing with care and precision in the forge. Focused on technique, shaping, and satisfying metalwork.

media:content.media:title: The Best Way to Twist Square Tubing
media:content.media:description: A calm, practical look at twisting square tubing with care and precision in the forge. Focused on technique, shaping, and satisfying metalwork.

item.title: Restoring Old Chisels
item.description: A careful look at restoring old chisels with traditional shop skill, clean shaping, and respect for the tool’s original purpose.

media:content.media:title: Restoring Old Chisels
media:content.media:description: A careful look at restoring old chisels with traditional shop skill, clean shaping, and respect for the tool’s original purpose.

item.title: Hook Rack Fix for a Cleaner Workflow
item.description: A small change that cleans up the wall and the workflow in the shop.

media:content.media:title: Hook Rack Fix for a Cleaner Workflow
media:content.media:description: A small change that cleans up the wall and the workflow in the shop.

item.title: Simple Forged Bottle Opener
item.description: A straightforward forging project for a strong, useful bottle opener—shaped by hand with simple shop techniques and clean, practical craftsmanship.

media:content.media:title: Simple Forged Bottle Opener
media:content.media:description: A straightforward forging project for a strong, useful bottle opener—shaped by hand with simple shop techniques and clean, practical craftsmanship.

item.title: Tiny Stock, Cleaner Finish, Better Hook
item.description: Tiny stock, cleaner finish, and a result worth making again.

media:content.media:title: Tiny Stock, Cleaner Finish, Better Hook
media:content.media:description: Tiny stock, cleaner finish, and a result worth making again.

item.title: Old Steel Rebuilt Into Something Useful
item.description: A simple rebuild turns old steel into something useful again.

media:content.media:description: A simple rebuild turns old steel into something useful again.

item.title: Scrap to Useful: Forging a Reveal
item.description: A rail spike starts as scrap and becomes something far more useful through careful forging and metalwork.

media:content.media:title: Scrap to Useful: Forging a Reveal
media:content.media:description: A rail spike starts as scrap and becomes something far more useful through careful forging and metalwork.

item.title: Mystery Steel Solves a Shop Problem
item.description: A blacksmithing reveal shows how this steel ends up solving a real shop problem through careful forging and metalworking.

media:content.media:title: Mystery Steel Solves a Shop Problem
media:content.media:description: A blacksmithing reveal shows how this steel ends up solving a real shop problem through careful forging and metalworking.

item.title: Hot Angle Iron Bending in the Forge
item.description: A simple bend can change quickly once the metal sets. A focused look at shaping hot angle iron with blacksmithing technique.

media:content.media:title: Hot Angle Iron Bending in the Forge
media:content.media:description: A simple bend can change quickly once the metal sets. A focused look at shaping hot angle iron with blacksmithing technique.

item.title: Hot Steel, Clean Movement, Clean Finish
item.description: Hot steel, clean movement, and a finish that makes the whole build click.

media:content.media:title: Hot Steel, Clean Movement, Clean Finish
media:content.media:description: Hot steel, clean movement, and a finish that makes the whole build click.
